projectDescription: LongFred is a WiFi-based wireless DCC throttle controller for model railway layouts, built on the ESP32-C6 and compatible with WiThrottle and Z21 command stations.
keyFeatures: Wireless DCC control over WiFi (WiThrottle and Z21 protocols)
Multi-throttle support — up to 6 simultaneous throttle slots
Up to 10 locos per consist per throttle slot
11 DCC function buttons (F0–F10) with customisable key mappings
Rotary encoder for smooth speed control
OLED display with real-time throttle status
mDNS auto-discovery of command stations on the local network
Battery level monitoring with icon display
NVS persistent storage: WiFi credentials, saved locos, device name/ID
publicApiSurface: WiThrottle protocol commands: add loco, release throttle, set speed, set direction, EStop, set function, track power, turnout, route, steal
Menu: Function, Add Loco, Drop Loco, Toggle Direction, Speed Multiplier, Throw Turnout, Close Turnout, Route, Track Power, Extras
Extras menu: Net Config, Device, Language, Function/Key Toggle, Heartbeat Toggle, Throttle Count +/-, Sleep, 1-Loco Toggle, Save Locos
Rotary encoder: speed up/down, encoder button action (configurable: stop then toggle direction)
Nav cluster buttons: Up, Down, Left, Right, OK, Back, Menu
NVS persistence: SavePassword, SaveLocos, SaveNetwork, SaveDevice, RegenerateDeviceId, SaveLanguage, Clear
Device settings: name (up to 32 chars), 4-digit numeric ID
Network config: DHCP or static IP/mask/gateway/DNS
